parsed_output.justification: James is the most suspicious player due to his contradictory claims. He first claimed to be the Tanner [107], then retracted this to say he was a 'lonely nobody' [132], which is inconsistent with the behavior of a real Tanner who would want to be voted out. Mitchell, claiming to be the Seer, stated he saw one Werewolf in the center [78], implying one Werewolf is still among the players. Given the inconsistencies in James's story, he is the most likely candidate for the Werewolf.
